headline: American Airlines Sinks 5%, United Falls 4%, Delta and JetBlue Slip 3% as Crude Oil Jumps
summary: Shares of American Airlines Group (NASDAQ:AAL) are down 5% in midday trading Wednesday, leading a broad airline selloff. United Airlines (NASDAQ:UAL) shares are off 4%, while Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) stock and JetBlue Airways (NASDAQ:JBLU) stock are each down 3%. The catalyst is a sharp jump in crude oil prices. headline: United (UAL) Launches New Cartagena Flights From Houston And Washington D.C.
summary: United Airlines Holdings (NasdaqGS:UAL) has introduced new nonstop routes to Cartagena, Colombia from Houston and Washington, D.C. The additional flights expand the airline's international network and increase direct connectivity between key U.S. hubs and Colombia. The new routes are paired with upgraded onboard amenities intended to improve the travel experience on these services.
